name: CombatMeter
description: Real-time party DPS/HPS meter with role colours.
author: Stellar

added: Server-region tagging: uploads now record whether you're on the SEA or JP server (detected automatically from your game install), so the two servers' runs, characters, and leaderboards never mix on the web.
changed: Requires framework 1.12.0 or newer (adds the game-environment service this build reads region from). If your region can't be detected, uploads are held rather than mis-filed — set environment.region in the framework config to override.
